---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''

---

For questions or general help, please use [Stan Discourse](https://discourse.mc-stan.org/) instead of this tracker.

## Pre-submission checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and confirmed that this is not a duplicate. I have linked any related issues.
- [ ] **AI use:** If I used an AI tool to help draft this issue, I have reviewed every line and am prepared to explain or defend reasoning

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

## Motivation and problem statement

<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe your proposed solution. Include API sketches, UI mockups, or pseudocode where helpful. -->

## Expected final result

**Status:**
- [ ] The expected final result is clear and I have described it below.
- [ ] The expected final result is not yet clear and needs to be discussed in this thread before any work begins.

<!-- Describe concretely what "done" looks like — e.g. a new function signature, a changed API response shape, a rendered UI element. This becomes the acceptance criterion for the feature. If the result is still unclear, describe the open questions instead and tick the "needs discussion" box above. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional. What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Optional. Links, prior art, related issues, screenshots, or anything else. -->
